title: Backend Skills
text: Rahul's backend engineering skills include Node.js, Express.js, REST API development, JWT authentication, authentication and authorization systems, Passport.js, RBAC workflows, middleware architecture, MVC architecture, protected routes, scalable backend structuring, API integration, CRUD systems, session handling, route organization, server-side validation, database workflows, and production-focused MERN backend engineering.

title: Frontend Skills
text: Rahul's frontend development skills include React.js, Next.js 15, TypeScript, JavaScript ES6+, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, responsive UI engineering, reusable component architecture, form validation systems, dashboard UI patterns, glassmorphism-inspired interfaces, animation orchestration, SEO fundamentals, cinematic frontend experiences, and premium SaaS-style product interface development.

title: AI Database And Tools Skills
text: Rahul's AI engineering and workflow skills include Gemini API, Claude API, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), Vector Databases (Upstash Vector), Embeddings, Semantic Search, prompt engineering, contextual prompting, AI recruiter assistant systems, semantic retrieval workflows, AI chatbot integrations, AI-powered UI systems, LLM-based interaction flows, and modern AI application integration. His database skills include MongoDB, MongoDB Atlas, Mongoose ODM, and scalable document-based data modeling. His tools and workflow expertise include Git, GitHub, Vite, Postman, Hoppscotch, Vercel, Render, Netlify, VS Code, NPM, deployment workflows, responsive debugging, version control systems, and PWA application patterns.
